description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build + Test that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix of self-hosted jobs across multiple architectures (x64, ARMv8.0, ARMv8.2, ARMv8.4) with a series of steps to check out the repository, update the rootfs cache, configure and build with CMake, and run various tests including IR tests, gcc target tests, API tests, and more.
